verdict: Spend is generating sales but lead capture is broken — only 2 leads from 1,036 clicks this period.
diagnosis: $1,958 spent drove 9 purchases worth $5,897, but the one tracked lead from Google call abandoned at $0 pipeline value.

signals.headline: Return on ad spend hit 3x
signals.detail: $5,897 in tracked purchases against $1,958 spend. Healthy for medical/wellness, but driven by a tiny conversion base.

signals.headline: Only 2 leads from 1,036 clicks
signals.detail: Lead conversion rate near 0.2% this period. Either tracking is misfiring or the landing page is failing senior visitors.

signals.headline: Cost per click jumped to $3.65
signals.detail: Latest period cost per click is 81% above the 28-day average of $2.02. Competition or bids drifted up.

signals.headline: 1 sole Google Ads call abandoned
signals.detail: Caller Keith Weiskopff came in but was missed and texted back. Pipeline value sits at $0. Phone coverage is the leak.

signals.headline: 9 purchases at $737 average
signals.detail: Average order value is strong for the Belle Watch line. The buyers who do convert are high quality.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Cost per lead well below category norm
benchmark.body: Healthcare cost per lead averages $57 for physicians and $98+ for wellness in 2026. Liferun's $12 cost per lead looks strong, but the count (2) is too small to trust.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.body: 44% of seniors over 65 report a fall, and warm months increase outdoor activity and fall exposure. Search demand for personal alert devices typically firms through summer.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.body: Apple Watch leads brand recall in the 2026 senior alert market. Bay Alarm, MobileHelp, and Medical Guardian are running 40%-off promos and free-month offers Liferun is not matching.

recommendations.title: Fix the missed-call problem on Google Ads calls
recommendations.detail: The one inbound call this period went to voicemail. Consider live answering during ad hours or a same-minute callback workflow. Each call is worth ~$737.

recommendations.title: Audit lead tracking on the landing page
recommendations.detail: 1,036 clicks produced 2 leads. Worth testing whether the form fires the pixel, and whether senior visitors can complete it on mobile without friction.

recommendations.title: Test a price or free-month offer in ad copy
recommendations.detail: Competitors are running 40% off and free-month promos. Worth testing a matching offer on the V4 ad to lift click-to-lead conversion.
